programme.desc: A former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law. Starring Scarlett Johansson (2005)

programme.title: Jack Hunter And The Star Of Heaven
programme.desc: (2008) Action starring Ivan Sergei. When archaeologist Jack Hunter's mentor is killed, he must find the culprit and stop ancient treasure falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: The Family Man
programme.desc: Investment broker, Jack (Nicolas Cage), finds his fast-lane lifestyle turned upside down when he wakes up in an alternate suburban universe where his sports car and girlfriend have become a mini-van and wife. He soon finds himself at a crossroad between his high-power career and the woman he loves.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Fortress: Sniper's Eye is an explosive, all-out-action cyber-thriller starring action megastar Bruce Willis with Jesse Metcalfe (Escape Plan II) and Chad Michael Murray (Riverdale).

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Regan (Ray Winstone) and his loyal partner George Carter (Ben Drew) are old school crime fighters enforcing the law in a modern underworld.

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: After adopting a cute puppy, Noelle's world is turned upside down when her boyfriend breaks up with her. After accepting an invitation to spend the holidays with a co-worker, she is surrounded by the Christmas cheer of a happy family and soon sparks begin to fly.

programme.title: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: The perfect Christmas story for all the family. Join eight-year old Julius as he embarks on a magical journey! Growing up in an orphanage, Julius has always been a bit of an outsider. However, one day he is wondrously transported to a frosty and enchanted world where, with the help of Herman the marzipan pig and Sophina the glass angel, he sets off to save Santa from the wicked hands of Crampus.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: A fugitive Secret Service agent must clear himself of murdering a colleague.

programme.title: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: A woman looks back at the past nineteen men she's had relationships with in her life and wonders if one of them might be her one true love.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Species: Species (1995)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: The Mist
programme.desc: A storm unleashes bloodthirsty creatures on a small town, where a band of citizens hole up in a supermarket.
A gang of criminals and corrupt cops plan the murder of a police officer in order to pull off a heist.

programme.title: Dead Man Down
programme.desc: A man left for dead goes after the Eastern European mob boss who killed his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Sleepless
programme.desc: Don't judge a cop by his cover. Rescue. Revenge. Redemption. To get justice, sometimes you have to get brutal.

programme.title: A Miracle on Christmas Lake
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend on Christmas Eve, Bobby goes out onto the lake and makes a shocking discovery. When the land is bought, Bobby must rally the town to save it.

programme.title: Benji's Very Own Christmas Story
programme.desc: On a surprise visit to meet Kris Kringle, Benji and his friends are shocked to discover that he plans to take the night off on Christmas Eve!

programme.title: 3 Day Christmas
programme.desc: Martin Taylor has totally lost touch with his family. He has no clue who his teenage daughter's friends are, why his son only communicates with an electronic sign outside his bedroom door, or why his youngest child watches so much TV. Convinced the family needs to reconnect, Martin surprises the wife and kids with a little experiment-he locks them in their own home with no power, no heat, no running water, and absolutely no contact with the world outside! The sudden holiday staycation isn't what the Taylors had in mind for Christmas, but they'll have to team up to prove they can survive Dad's wacky mission and their wackier relatives. With a little planning and a whole lot of love, this just might turn into the best Taylor family Christmas yet!

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Recently widowed, Julia (Olivia Newton-John) is left to raise two young girls on her own, and when she loses her job, things go from bad to worse as she struggles to pay her bills. Then, arriving at her idyllic mountain home, city banker Brian Harding (Gregory Harrison) is tasked to deliver some devastating news - she'll need to hand over the property after Christmas. However, an unlikely relationship begins when Brian crashes his car nearby, and Julia graciously offers for him to stay with her over the holidays while he heals up and waits out the snowstorm. Eventually won over by the love and determination of the small family, might Brian find a way to bring them a Christmas miracle?

programme.title: The Captor
programme.desc: Starring Ethan Hawke and Noomi Rapace and from the executive producer of BlacKkKlansman, this thrilling crime caper is based on the absurd but true story of the 1973 Stockholm bank heist. Outlaw Lars takes two workers hostage and demands his friend is released from prison, $1 million and a getaway car. As negotiations reach deadlock, hostage Bianca becomes strangely attracted to her captor.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: No time off when it comes to crime! Starring Bruce Willis (Looper) and Gethin Anthony (Game of Thrones) this nail-biting, explosive thriller sees a holiday gone horribly wrong! In an attempt to reconnect with his son, Will (Haydn Christensen Jumper) takes his family to the cabin where he grew up. However, their trip takes a deadly turn when they witness the murder of a crooked police officer.

programme.title: The Triangle
programme.desc: In the summer of 2012, a group of four filmmakers receives a cryptic postcard from their friend, Nathaniel, who's been AWOL for more than three years. Despite the misgivings of one of the filmmakers, the group heads to Montana to answer Nathaniel's plea for help. With cameras rolling, the filmmakers set off to capture life inside what is either a harmless commune or something much more sinister

programme.title: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: After surviving and killing her serial killer boyfriend, a young woman rebuilds her life with a new job at an all-night gas station. Haunted by visions of her boyfriend's crimes and delusions of his imminent return, what seems like a routine night becomes one of mayhem and murder. As the bodies start to pile up, will she survive the night?

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: A perfumer's daughter works to meet the production deadline for her late father's company's latest scent which is missing one elusive ingredient. Starring Shantel VanSanten (2017)

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: This is an adaption of the much-loved coming over age title of four sisters trying to build their own identity whilst navigating life, gets a modern-day retailing. (2018)

programme.title: Written in The Stars
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Kimberley Crossman. A journalist teams up with an astrology guru to write about a local meteor shower festival - but will love also be written in the stars?

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: Rekindling Christmas
programme.desc: Drafted by the NFL Jesse left his college sweetheart behind. Now, years later, he's back with only one goal, to win Annika back.

programme.title: Lust For Love
programme.desc: Astor's happy tenacity spoils his one chance at love with his lifelong crush Mila. Convinced he needs more experience with women to win her back, he engages her ex-best friend Cali to teach him how to woo women.

programme.title: The Dreamers
programme.desc: The tumultuous political landscape of Paris in 1968 is the backdrop as three young cineastes are drawn together through their passion for film.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Christmas Mingle
programme.desc: A 30-something marketing executive with a top-notch career, killer wardrobe, dream apartment and great friends fills out a profile on a dating website hoping to find Mr. Right. However, her attempts at impressing her dream guy ends in disaster.

programme.title: A Candlelit Christmas
programme.desc: Ellie, a perfume maker, travels back home for Christmas and help her dad with the business. Little does she know, that Logan is staying with him. As Ellie's attempts to learn about her family, Logan helps her realize that fairy tales do indeed exist!

programme.title: Tails of Christmas
programme.desc: A military veteran searches for purpose in his life after an injury cut his career short. He finds it in a kind woman who runs an animal shelter. As they work together to find animals homes during the Christmas adoption season, they develop feelings for each other, and help each other with the challenges each faces.

programme.title: A Model Christmas
programme.desc: Cali, an up-and-coming model, sees that there is more to life than just work when she and her driver, Jack, are forced to seek shelter from the winter weather at Jack's family home.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Ruling of the Heart
programme.desc: Judge Morgan has become known for his no-nonsense toughness in court. He rules fast and he rules hard, barely noticing the person on the other end of his decisions. When he gets stuck in a cafe during a snowstorm, he is surprised to discover two of the other customers stranded with him happen to be people recently in his court, with verdicts handed down that have made him very unpopular. As the night unfolds in the small cafe, unexpected truth emerges from both sides that changes everything.

programme.title: Steppin' Into the Holiday
programme.desc: Billy returns to his hometown and helps revive the town's Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Megan hunts for top Christmas hashtag to wow boss and crush at work.

programme.title: The Santa Con
programme.desc: Small-time con man Nick DeMarco is ordered to take a minimum-wage job.

programme.title: Steppin' Into the Holiday
programme.desc: Billy returns to his hometown and helps revive the town's Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: Hearts & Vines
programme.desc: A builder and decorator on a home renovation show end up quarantined during the holidays in the home they are renovating

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: An ancient mummified Incan priest is brought back to life after a botched museum heist.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A convicted murderer recants his confession on the grounds that he was mistaking psychic visions for reality.

programme.title: Killer on the Island
programme.desc: On vacation with her husband, a woman suspects a local of multiple murders and fears she's next.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki has trouble building a case against Elana, a nightclub owner she knows is actually Medusa.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: At the Gamma Christmas Mixer, Sarah is missing and her friends' search leads to a shocking attack.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: DADDY DAY CARE pals Charlie and Phil are back in this hilarious, all-new adventure: DADDY DAY CAMP! When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood - serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure DADDY DAY CAMP secures its rightful place in kid camp history!

programme.title: A Few Dollars for Django
programme.desc: Regan, a bounty hunter longing for a new life and perhaps a role as sheriff, is pulled back into action when a murder sets him on the trail of bank robbers. This pursuit thrusts him into a violent range war between farmers and cattlemen, forcing him to choose between his desire for peace and the harsh reality of his past.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: Ted Hayden impersonates a wanted man and joins Gentry's gang only to learn later that Gentry was the one who killed his father. He saves Virginia Winters' dad's ranch from Gentry and also rescues his long-lost brother Spud.

programme.title: New Frontier (1939)
programme.desc: The state government plans to build a flood-control dam and condemns the property of the local farmers and ranchers, including The Three Mesquiteers. The state intends to compensate the land-owners fairly, but a crooked real-estate promoter complicates things. The ranchers, led by Stony Brooke ('John Wayne' (q)), Tucson Smith ('Ray Corrigan') and Rusty Joslin (Raymond Hatton) fight back against both the law and the crooks.

programme.title: The Godless Ones
programme.desc: An outlaw and a bounty hunter are searching for Mexican bandit Corbancho, who is running the El Paso area, and has also robbed the Bank of Tuscon of $400,000.

programme.title: Fifteen Scaffolds for the Killer
programme.desc: Accused of a hideous crime they did not commit, the members of two rivaling gangs, persecuted by a bloodthirsty lynch mob, take refuge in an abandoned fort, taking two hostages with them.

programme.title: Call of the Forest
programme.desc: Bob Brand is looking for a lost gold mine. Storm Cloud makes friends with Bob's son Bobby and to repay Bob for the help he gave the Indians, he gives a map locating the mine to the boy.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: A Harley Street doctor sets off for Cornwall for a spot of fishing when he catches a beautiful mermaid. He brings her home and his wife is shocked to see a beautiful young woman with her legs wrapped in cloth. Will anyone discover the secret?

programme.title: Band Waggon
programme.desc: After being evicted from BBC Broadcasting House, Arthur (Arthur Askey) and his friend Stinker move to a castle where they come upon television equipment which they use to put on a show - not realising that it is in use by German agents.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Best Mistake 1 : The Movie
programme.desc: Kim Yeon Do (Lee Eun Jae) is a studious high school girl whose life is being made miserable by a boy from her past. Despite all of her efforts, she can't get peace as he won't leave her alone. So she hatches a plan. On her social media pages, she posts a picture of another boy, in the hope that this move will put an end to the irritation. But this move turns out to have unexpected consequences: It turns out that the boy in the picture is actually one of her schoolmates. Named Ji Hyun Ho (Kang Yul), he is a bit of a loose cannon. Although he is very popular, he dislikes studying - and prefers play. The rest of the school soon learns about the social media post, as news spreads fast in the classroom! This leads to a number of run-ins with ji Hyun Ho. But the more they get to know one another, the closer they get - causing yet further complications for a whole host of classmates!

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky

Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: My Punch-Drunk Boxer
programme.desc: A former professional boxer who has been diagnosed with punch-drunk syndrome tries to revive his boxing career.

programme.title: Fourth Place
programme.desc: Junho a 11-year-old swimmer always records 4th place at all the swimming contests. His mom is more frustrated than himself in winning as she believes swimming is the only way for him to become successful. One day she manages to hire a personal coach who once was the most promising athlete on the national team. But he trains Junho the only way he knows how to use violence

programme.title: The Silenced
programme.desc: With her class mates' mysterious disappearances Ju-ran gets involved with her school's dark secrets.

programme.title: A Day
programme.desc: A world-famous father gets stuck in a loop as he continues to fail to save his daughter only to find that this phenomenon is related to his past.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Edge of War
programme.desc: A series of incidents around the world lead to greater conflict, placing the superpowers at one another's throats. Armies march, bombs rain down, soldiers storm the beaches. One family is caught up in the conflict, can they survive as total war is declared and nuclear weapons are unleashed?

programme.title: The Last Boy on Earth
programme.desc: In a distant future, an enigmatic boy becomes the central figure in the search for a new hope.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a mysterious cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son in New England.

programme.title: Revolt
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, a U.S. Special Forces soldier known only as ‘Bo' (Lee Pace) wakes up in a prison cell in Nairobi with no idea how he got there or indeed who he is.

programme.title: Holiday Hotline
programme.desc: (2023) Phone-omenal romance with Emily Tennant. There's love on the line when a woman working at a switchboard connects with a charming anonymous caller - but she doesn't realise they've already met.

programme.title: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: (2016) Romance starring Jaime King. Two Christmas haters agree to navigate the season together - but with the magic of the season beginning to take hold, will love also be on the cards?

programme.title: Christmas By Design
programme.desc: (2023) Festive rom com with Rebecca Dalton. Reluctantly in her hometown for Christmas, can NYC fashion designer Charlotte discover what's really important in life with the help of a charming local?

programme.title: Christmas On Holly Lane
programme.desc: (2018) Feel-good drama with Sarah Lancaster. Three lifelong friends reunite in a house filled with years of memories and make a plan to save the place that was so special to them through childhood.

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric is known for being a Christmas grouch. But will his neighbour and young relatives teach him to embrace the prospect of love and the spirit of Christmas? Jesse Metcalfe stars. (2017)

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Coming home in the dark
programme.desc: A family's outing descends into terror when teacher Alan Hoaganraad, his wife Jill and stepsons Maika and Jordon explore an isolated coastline. An unexpected meeting with a pair of drifters thrusts the family into a nightmare when they find themselves captured.

programme.title: Unfaithful
programme.desc: A middle-aged wife and mother has an affair with a handsome younger man, but her husband murders him when he finds out about the affair, and husband and wife must reckon with what happened.

programme.title: Margin Call
programme.desc: Margin Call is an entangling thriller involving the key players at an investment firm during one perilous 24-hour period in the early stages of the 2008 financial crisis. Decisions both financial and moral catapult the lives of all involved to the brink of disaster

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: Casualties Of War
programme.desc: From visionary director Brian De Palma, war is war, but murder is murder. Michael J. Fox and Sean Penn star in this action-packed Vietnam war saga in which one soldier thought he had a license to kill and another dared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Doing Hard Time
programme.desc: Michael's seven-year-old son is killed in the crossfire of a drug deal gone bad. When the shootersget nothing but a short sentence for possession, Michael is outraged, and goes on a quest for revenge inside the prison where his son's killers are doing time.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: Fireflies in the Garden
programme.desc: The Taylor family is devastated by an accident that takes place on the day their matriarch is due to graduate from college.

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: Drawn from true-life events, it takes a glimpse into the turbulent relationships between fledgling psychiatrist Carl Jung, his mentor Sigmund Freud and Sabina Spielrein, the troubled but beautiful young woman who comes between them.

programme.title: 5 Days of War (5 Days of August)
programme.desc: In August 2008, amid the war between Russia and Georgia in South Ossetia American reporter Thomas Anders (Rupert Friend, The Young Victoria) and his cameraman (Richard Coyle, Prince of Persia: Sands of Time) try to document the escalating conflict.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: When ex-Government agent Luke Wright exposes the Russian mafia for rigging an illegal fight, they seek revenge on his family and threaten to kill anyone close to him.

programme.title: Dead Man Down
programme.desc: When the body of a gang member is discovered in the freezer of crime boss Alphonse's (Terrence Howard) mansion - a clear message has been sent… or has it?
